title: Sub-Items Automation Triggers
excerpt: We need to be able to trigger automations based on sub-items so we can set rules on sub-items same as we do on items as needed. Should be an option to create rule that applies to items, items and subitems or only subitem…

posts.author: philip.beaudoin (Phil Beaudoin)
posts.cookedHtml: We need to be able to trigger automations based on sub-items so we can set rules on sub-items same as we do on items as needed. Should be an option to create rule that applies to items, items and subitems or only subitems.
